			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = rome
		}

		JUD = { # Herodian Judea; P8.1;OCD
			own_control_core = {
				jerusalem
			}

			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = jerusalem
		}

		XAB = { # Herodian Galilee-Peraea; P8.1;OCD;PLE
			own_control_core = {
				safed
			}

			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = safed
		}

		XAC = { # Herodian Batanea; P8.1;OCD;PLE

				antilebanon_mountains1

			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = luoyang
		}

		XIO = { # Xiongnu Confederation; P8.3;CAH-XI
			own_control_core = {
				qingzhou_mongol
			}

			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = qingzhou_mongol
		}

		XAS = { # Khotan; P8.3;CHG
			own_control_core = {
				khotan
			}

			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = khotan
		}

		KUC = { # Kucha; P8.3;CHG
			own_control_core = {
				kucha
			}

			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = kucha
		}

		XAT = { # Kashgar; P8.3;CHG
			own_control_core = {
				kashgar
			}

			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = kashgar
		}

		LOU = { # Loulan; P8.3;CHG
			own_control_core = {
				loulan
			}

			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = loulan

			include = "asia_advanced_tribe"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = olentangy
		}

		XCZ = { # Basketmaker II; P8.10;CAH-XI
			own_control_core = {
				moanunts
			}

			include = "asia_advanced_tribe"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = moanunts
		}

		DOR = { # Dorset; P8.10;CAH-XI
			own_control_core = {
				iqaluit
			}

			include = "asia_advanced_tribe"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = iqaluit
		}

		XDB = { # Arawak Societies; P8.10;CAH-XI
			own_control_core = {
				guamontey
			}

			include = "asia_advanced_tribe"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = guamontey
		}

		XDC = { # Tupi Societies; P8.10;CAH-XI
			own_control_core = {
				manaos
			}

			include = "asia_advanced_tribe"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = manaos
		}

		XDD = { # Carib Societies; P8.10;CAH-XI
			own_control_core = {
				carucairi
			}

			include = "asia_advanced_tribe"
			government = { ruler = random }
			capital = carucairi
		}

	}
}
